positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a majestic nocturnal owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl should have detailed, textured feathers and striking, illuminated yellow eyes. The composition must be highly symmetrical and central, with the owl slightly facing the viewer. Incorporate elegant, stylized constellations and delicate bioluminescent flora floating around the perch. Style: Clean line art meets neo-Art Nouveau elegance, rendered with strong, deep indigo blues, vibrant gold accents, and pops of glowing teal. The overall aesthetic should be high contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, featuring clear, defined silhouettes and clean edges. Vector art quality, perfect for apparel print, graphic novel style.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, fuzzy, grain, noise, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, low resolution, sketch, photograph, realism, messy
